experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Adobe Extensions)
bullets: Shipped production Adobe After Effects & Premiere Pro extensions with <<React>> UI and <<Node.js>> tooling, including Vanish BG (real-time AI background removal) published on https://aescripts.com.
Designed a <<Node.js>> sidecar architecture to bypass Adobe CEP sandbox limits, using local HTTP IPC to stream inference outputs to the UI in real time.
Implemented local model inference workflows (<<ONNX>>) and integrated them into user-facing editing pipelines with low-latency feedback loops.
Collaborated asynchronously with designers and stakeholders, delivering production-ready features with clear ownership and iterative releases.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Built a full-stack tourism booking platform using <<Next.js>>, <<TypeScript>>, and <<Node.js>> with type-safe <<PostgreSQL>> access via TypeORM.
Improved backend performance using <<PostgreSQL>> indexing and <<EXPLAIN ANALYZE>>, achieving sub-100ms API response times under concurrent load.
Integrated Paymob payments with <<idempotent>> transaction handling and secure webhook verification, reducing checkout friction by 40%.
Raised SEO and Core Web Vitals to 95+ Lighthouse via <<Next.js>> SSR, image optimization, and lazy loading.

education.degree: Complete SQL Databases Bootcamp: Zero to Mastery
Master the Coding Interview: Data Structures & Algorithms

projects.name: RootCluster — AI-Powered Log Analysis Platform
projects.techStack: Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, BullMQ, ONNX, AWS ECS Fargate, Docker, GitHub Actions
highlights: Designed and deployed a distributed, <<event-driven>> ingestion pipeline on <<AWS ECS Fargate>> using <<BullMQ>> for job queuing, <<Redis>> for caching/rate limiting, and <<PostgreSQL>> (<<pgvector>>) for similarity search, processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency.
Implemented robust <<async processing>> patterns: producer-consumer queues, worker pools with configurable concurrency, and priority routing for urgent vs. backfill workloads.
Built <<dead-letter queues>> with retry policies (exponential backoff, max attempts) to isolate malformed events without blocking the pipeline.
Designed <<idempotent>> processing with Redis-backed dedup keys and at-least-once delivery semantics via job completion callbacks.
Reduced <<ONNX>> embedding time from 20+ minutes to under 1 minute via batching, caching, and worker autoscaling.
Delivered CI/CD using <<GitHub Actions>> with AWS OIDC to ECR, plus RDS PostgreSQL, ElastiCache, SSM Parameter Store, and automated deployments.

projects.name: Medical CRM — AI-Enhanced Prescription Platform
highlights: Built a full-stack CRM for diagnoses, prescriptions, and patient records with <<React>> and <<Node.js>> backed by <<PostgreSQL>>.
Implemented secure authentication with <<JWT>> access/refresh token rotation and <<RBAC>> across three permission levels.
Designed drug interaction validation across 500+ medications using graph-based <<PostgreSQL>> lookups.
Optimized dashboard queries for 10K+ monthly records using composite indexes and window functions.
